qa_pairs.question: What are your opening hours?
qa_pairs.answer: We are open Monday to Thursday 11 AM to 10 PM, Friday and Saturday 11 AM to 11 PM, and Sunday 12 PM to 9 PM.

qa_pairs.question: Do you offer delivery?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, we offer delivery through our website, phone, and third-party apps. Delivery is available within 5 km radius.

qa_pairs.question: How long does delivery take?
qa_pairs.answer: Typical delivery time is 30-45 minutes depending on your location and current order volume.

qa_pairs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
qa_pairs.answer: We accept cash, credit cards, debit cards, digital wallets (PayPal, Apple Pay), and cryptocurrency.

qa_pairs.question: Can I make a reservation?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you can make reservations online through our website or call us at +1-800-RESTAURANT.

qa_pairs.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated vegetarian menu with 20+ options including salads, pasta, and plant-based proteins.

qa_pairs.question: Are there any dietary restrictions you accommodate?
qa_pairs.answer: We accommodate vegan, gluten-free, nut-free, and dairy-free diets. Please inform us when ordering.

qa_pairs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
qa_pairs.answer: Orders can be cancelled free of charge up to 30 minutes before preparation begins.

qa_pairs.question: Do you offer group discounts?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, we offer 15% discount for groups of 8 or more. Please call ahead to arrange.

qa_pairs.question: What is your contact information?
qa_pairs.answer: Phone: +1-800-RESTAURANT, Email: info@restaurant.com, Address: 123 Main Street, City, State 12345

qa_pairs.question: Do you have Wi-Fi?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, free high-speed Wi-Fi is available for all customers. Password available from staff.

qa_pairs.question: Can I host a private event?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, we have private dining rooms available for events up to 100 people. Contact our event coordinator.

qa_pairs.question: What is your most popular dish?
qa_pairs.answer: Our signature dish is the Pan-Seared Salmon with lemon butter sauce and seasonal vegetables.

qa_pairs.question: Do you offer catering?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, we offer catering for events. Minimum order is 20 people. Contact us for a custom quote.

qa_pairs.question: What are your peak hours?
qa_pairs.answer: Peak hours are typically Friday-Saturday 7-9 PM and Sunday 1-3 PM. We recommend reservations.
